evals.name: happy-path-security-design
evals.prompt: Design the security architecture for our new multi-tenant SaaS platform that processes payment data and health records.
evals.expected_output: Complete security architecture with threat model, zero trust design, IAM, data protection, application security pipeline, and compliance mapping
expectations: Produces STRIDE or PASTA threat model covering trust boundaries
Designs zero trust architecture with maturity model
Includes IAM design with authorization model selection
Maps compliance requirements for PCI-DSS and HIPAA
Includes data classification and encryption strategy

evals.name: edge-case-legacy-no-security
evals.prompt: Assess the security architecture of our 15-year-old monolith. It has no formal security design, no threat model, and uses basic username/password authentication.
evals.expected_output: Current-state threat model with prioritized remediation plan starting with auth/authz gaps
expectations: Starts with threat model of current state
Prioritizes auth/authz gaps as highest priority
Phases improvements aligned with existing roadmap
Does not recommend a full rewrite as first step

evals.name: edge-case-multi-tenant-isolation
evals.prompt: We're building a SaaS product where tenants can store sensitive data. How do we ensure tenant isolation in our security architecture?
evals.expected_output: Tenant isolation architecture with data-level access control, tenant-scoped encryption, and cross-tenant leakage testing
expectations: Addresses tenant isolation as paramount concern
Designs data-level access control per tenant
Recommends tenant-scoped encryption keys
Includes explicit cross-tenant data leakage testing

evals.name: edge-case-zero-trust-brownfield
evals.prompt: We want to implement zero trust but we have 200+ microservices already running without mTLS or service mesh. Where do we start?
evals.expected_output: Phased zero trust adoption plan using crawl-walk-run maturity model for brownfield environment
expectations: Uses crawl-walk-run maturity model
Starts with identity and MFA as crawl phase
Plans progressive mTLS/service mesh adoption
Estimates realistic timeline of 18-36 months for full maturity

evals.name: false-positive-pen-test
evals.prompt: Can you run a penetration test on our production API endpoints and find vulnerabilities?
evals.expected_output: Polite decline explaining that penetration testing execution requires a specialized security team and is outside scope
expectations: Does NOT attempt to run penetration tests
Clarifies that pen testing execution is outside scope
May offer to design the threat model or security testing pipeline instead
Recommends engaging a specialized security team for pen testing
